input.command:
for d in 2026/01/25 2026/01/26; do
  f="articles/$d/articles.jsonl"; [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== $d ==="
  cat "$f" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
kw=re.compile(r'(afc|nfc).*(championship|title game)|(chiefs|bills|ravens|texans).*(win|advance|super bowl)|tyson fury.*(opponent|fight|joshua|comeback)|australian open.*(men|semifinal|final|sinner|alcaraz|djokovic)',re.I)
seen=set()
for line in sys.stdin:
    try: a=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    t=a.get('title','')
    if kw.search(t) and t not in seen:
        seen.add(t); print(' -',(a.get('source','?'))[:16],'|',t[:120])
" | head -14
done
